title: lupinus subvexus var. subvexus
intro: Lupinus subvexus var. subvexus, also known as the Pacific lupine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lupine family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Lupinus subvexus var. subvexus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
